name: Explosive Delivery
description: Whenever you throw a skill, 1.5 seconds after landing, it creates an explosion damaging enemies within 5m.  Afterwards explosions will occur evey 5s.  Damage scales with skill tier dealing 25-100% damage of a concussion grenade.   Occurs once per skill.   Applies to Remote Pulse, All Turrets, All Hives, Explosive Seeker, Cluster Seeker, Mender Seeker, Decoy, All Traps.

name: Kinetic Momentum
description: When in combat, each skill generates stacks while active or not on cooldown  Each stack increases your total skill damage by 1.5% and total skill repair by 2%.  Up to 15 (18) stacks per skill. Stacks are lost when skills go on cooldown.

name: Gunslinger
description: Weapon swapping increases total weapon damage by 23% (28%) for 5s.  This buff is lost for 5s if you weapon swap while it is active.

name: Focus
description: Increases total weapon damage by 5% (6%) every second you are aiming while scoped 8x or higher, up to 50% (60%).

name: Spark
description: Damaging an enemy with a skill increases total weapon damage by 15% (18%) for 15s (20s).

name: Obliterate
description: Critical hits increase total weapon damage by 1% for 10s. Stacks up to 20 (24) times.

name: Intimidate
description: While you have bonus armour, gain 3 stacks each second up to a max of 9 (10). Each stack increases total weapon damage by 4% to enemies within 10m.  All stacks are lost when you have no bonus armour.

name: Headhunter
description: After killing an enemy with a headshot, your next weapon hit within 30s deals 125% (150%) of that killing blow's damage in addition to it. Damage is capped to 800% of your weapon damage. This is raised to 1250% if your headshot damage is greater than 150%.

name: Empathic Resolve
description: Repairing an ally, increases their total weapon and skill damage by 3-15% for 10s. 1-7% if self.  Effectiveness increased by your skill tier.

name: Overwatch
description: After staying in cover for 10s (8s), increase your and all allies' total weapon and skill damage by 12% (14%) as long as you remain in cover or in a cover-to-cover move.

name: Glass Cannon
description: All damage you deal is amplified by 25% (30%).  All damage you take is amplified by 50% (60%).

name: Spotter
description: Amplifies total weapon and skill damage by 15% (20%) to pulsed enemies.

name: Unbreakable
description: When your armor is depleted, repair 95% (100%) of your armor. 60s (55s) cool down.

name: Vanguard
description: Deploying a shield makes it invulnerable for 5s and grants 45% (50%) of your armor as bonus armor to all other allies for 20s.   Cooldown: 25s

name: Protected Reload
description: Grants +20% (40%) bonus armor while reloading.  Grants 0%-18% (0-30%) of your armor as bonus armor to all other allies when they are reloading  Each blue core attribute adds 3% to the bonus armour Maximum is 18%

name: Entrench
description: If you are below 30% armor, headshots from cover repair 20% of your armor.  Cooldown: 2 (1) seconds.

name: Efficient
description: Using an armor kit has a 50% (75%) chance to not consume the armor kit. Specialization armor kit bonuses are increased by 100%.  Requires 10 seconds to arm talent

name: Mad Bomber
description: Grenade Radius is increased by 50% (75%) Grenade that kill an enemy are refunded. Grenades can now be ''cooked'' by holding the fire button, making them explode earlier. Gain 15% bonus armor while aiming grendes

name: Braced
description: While in cover weapon handling is increased by 45% (50%).

name: Skilled
description: Skill kills have a 25% (30%) chance to reset skill cooldowns.

name: Tag Team
description: The last enemy you have damaged with a skill is marked.  Dealing weapon damage to that enemy consumes the mark to reduce active cooldowns by 6s.   Cooldown: 4s

name: Trauma
description: Applies blind to an enemy hit in the head. Cooldown: 30 (20) seconds. Applies bleed to an enemy hit in the chest. Cooldown: 30 (20) seconds.

name: Tamper Proof
description: Enemies that walk within 3 meters of your hive, turret, remote pulse, or decoy are shocked. Arm time: 2 seconds. Cooldown per skill: 10 seconds.(8s)

name: Reassigned
description: Killing an enemy adds 1 round of a random special ammo into your sidearm. Cooldown: 15 seconds.

name: Combined Arms
description: Shooting an enemy increases total skill damage by 25% (30%) for 3s.

name: Tech Support
description: Skill kills increase total skill damage by 25% for 25s (27s).

name: Shock and Awe
description: Applying a status effect to an enemy increases total skill damage and repair by 20% for 20s (27s).

name: Vigilance
description: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage disables this buff for 4s (3s).

name: Versatile
description: Amplifies total weapon damage for 10s when swapping between your primary and secondary weapons if they are different.  35% (45%) to enemies within 15m for Shotguns and SMGs 35% (45%) to enemies further than 25m for Rifles and MMRs 10% (20%) to enemies between 15-25m for LMGs and Assault Rifles.  At most once per 5s per weapon type.

name: Unstoppable Force
description: Killing an enemy increases total weapon damage by 5 (7)% for 15s.  Stacks up to 5 times.  Grenade kills add 2 stacks.

name: Companion
description: While you are within 5 (10) m of an ally or skill, total weapon damage is increased by 15% (20%) Perfect is on named CHEST item Only.

name: Composure
description: While in cover, increases total weapon damage by 15% (20%).

name: Concussion
description: Headshots increase total weapon damage by 10% for 1.5s. 5s with marksman rifles.  Headshot kills increase total weapon damage by 15% for 10s.  Both buffs can be active for an increase of 25% total weapon damage

name: Wicked
description: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 20s (27s).

name: Opportunistic
description: Enemies you hit with shotguns and marksman rifles amplifies the damage they take by 10% (15%) from all sources for 5s.

name: Clutch
description: When you are below 15% (20%) armor, critical hits repair 2.5% of missing armor.  On kill, critical hits repair 2.5% of missing armor for 4 seconds. Lowest possible repair is 0% armour  Each red core attribute adds 1 second to the time. Maximum is 10 seconds.

name: Safeguard
description: While at full armor, increases total skill repair by 130%.

name: Bloodsucker
description: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +10% (12%) bonus armor for 10s. Max stack is 10.

name: Leadership
description: Performing a cover to cover grants 15% (20%) of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies for 10s.  This is doubled (tripled) if you end within 10m of an enemy.   Cooldown: 10s.

name: Protector
description: When your shield is damaged, you gain +5% and all other allies gain +15% of your armor as bonus armor for 3s.   Cooldown: 3s.

name: Adrenaline Rush
description: When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 20% (23%) bonus armor for 5s. Stacks up to 3 times.  Cooldown: 5s

name: Galvanize
description: Applying a Blind, Ensnare, Confuse, or Shock to an enemy grants 40% (50%) of your armor as bonus armor to you and all allies within 20m (30m) of that enemy for 10s

name: Energize
description: Using an armor kit grants +1 skill tier for 15s.  If already at skill tier 6, grants overcharge.   Cooldown: 60s (30s)

name: Calculated
description: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 10% (15%).

name: Overclock
description: You and allies within 7m (15) of your deployed skills, gain +25% (30) reload speed and reduces active cooldowns by 0.2 (0.6) each second.

name: Creeping Death
description: When you apply a status effect, it is also applied to all enemies within 8m (10m) of your target.   Cooldown: 15s (10s)

name: Accelerando
description: Decreases the number of stacks needed to proc the Symphony double buffs from 4 to 3.

name: Ace in the Sleeve
description: Amplifies 1 extra shot when revealing your hand.

name: Advanced Combat Tactics
description: Increases Ground Control proximity repair from 60% to 120%.

name: All for One
description: Increase the amount of marks that can be placed from 4 to 8.

name: Best Buds
description: Increase the damage buff from 25% to 50%.

name: Chain Combustion
description: Enemies set ablaze by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype ignite other enemies within 2m.

name: Cold
description: Stacks now supply +2% bonus armor.

name: Complete Uptime
description: Cancelling your skills will reset their cooldown.

name: Compiler Optimization
description: Decreases Hackstep Protocol cooldown from 20s to 15s.

name: Critical Measures
description: Increases Crowd Control damage to additional marked enemies from 60% to 112%.

name: Deceit
description: Enemies targeting your Decoy also count towards the Stoic Damage Reduction bonus.

name: Endless Hunger
description: Increases the duration of Apex Predator stacks from 10s to 30s.

name: Fortissimo
description: Double the weapon damage bonus from Symphony.

name: From the Shadows
description: Increases max stacks for Into the Light from 50 to 100, stack gain from 10 to 20 and stack consumption from 10 to 20.

name: Heatstroke
description: +25% Weapon Damage to enemies set on fire by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype. +25% Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype Range.

name: Hivemind
description: Decrease the Overcharge cooldown from 40s to 25s.

name: Improved Materials
description: Decreases time taken for Makeshift Repairs from 10s to 5s.

name: Inner Core
description: Increase the percentage of the bonuses you receive from the other Cores from 40% to 60%.

name: Increased Interest
description: For PvE: Increase the repairs received from Return to Sender from 10% to 25%, and from 20% to 35%. For PvP: Increase the repairs received from Return to Sender from 5% to 15%, and from 10% to 20%.

name: Into the Light
description: Increases max stacks for From the Shadows from 50 to 100, stack gain from 10 to 20.

name: Lucky
description: Agents can miss a headshot before resetting the cycle.

name: Max BPM
description: Max stack is now 100.

name: Multithreaded Execution
description: Increases Hackstep Protocol bonus armor from 50% to 100%.

name: No Limit
description: Increases Dead Man's Hand damage bonus from 30% to 50%.

name: One for All
description: Increase the Weapon Damage bonus per stack from 3% to 5%.

name: Outer Core
description: This Talent does not provide a direct change to the Core Exercise Talent.

name: Over-engineered
description: While at full Armor, repairs received from Return to Sender will provide Bonus Armor, up to 80% of your Total Armor. Does not apply to allies.

name: Overcharging
description: Increases Charging max incoming damage protection to 70%.

name: Overwhelming Force
description: Increases the radius of disorient on Apex Predator kills from 5m to 10m.

name: Parabellum Rounds
description: Increases Hollow-Point Ammo weapon damage amplification to 50%. Does not affect party ammo.

name: Patriotic Boost
description: Increases Red, White, and Blue debuff strength. Red: From 8% to 12%. White: From 2% to 3%. Blue: From 8% to 12%.

name: Point of honor
description: Increases On Point Weapon Damage bonus from 4% to 7.2%.

name: Point of no Return
description: Increase On Point bonuses timer from 10s to 15s.

name: Polyethylene Plating
description: Increase Stoic Damage Resistance bonus from 4% to 5%.

name: Positive Reinforcement
description: Increases Feedback Loop skill damage and repair bonus from +10% to +25%.

name: Press the Advantage
description: Increases max stacks for Striker's Gamble from 100 to 200. 3 stacks lost per second between 101 and 200 stacks.

name: Process Refinery
description: Increases Makeshift Repairs from 25% over 10s to 35% over 10s.

name: Proliferation
description: Increases Indirect Transmission range from 10m to 15m. Increases refresh percentage from 50% to 75%.

name: Risk Management
description: Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker's Gamble from 0.65% to 0.9%.

name: Safe Charging
description: Charging gives 10% protection per second.

name: Short Circuit
description: Decreases Feedback Loop cooldown from 10s to 5s.

name: Signature Moves
description: +50% Weapon Damage for 15s after fully depleting the Signature Weapon of ammo. Doubles the amount of ammo generated by Aggressive Recon.

name: Smart Cooperation
description: Decrease the cooldown for destroying Mortars and enemy skills from 10s to 1s.

name: Snowball
description: Increase the Critical Hit Damage received per stack from 4% to 7%.

name: Specialized Destruction
description: Increase Aggressive Recon Signature Weapon Damage bonus from 15% to 30%. Every 3rd Signature Weapon kill generates Signature Weapon ammo.

name: Stand Tall
description: Increases bonus Armor from 50% to 100%.

name: Sustainability
description: Increase the maximum number of stacks from 50 to 75.

name: Symptom Aggravator
description: Amplifies all damage you deal to status affected targets by 30%.

name: Tactical Superiority
description: Increases Ground Control damage bonus from 15% to 25%.

name: Target Rich Environment
description: Increases Crowd Control mark count from 3 to 5.

name: Trauma Specialist
description: Increases duration of bleed status effects by 50% and all bleed damage done by 100%.

name: Waving the Flag
description: Increases Red, White, and Blue rotation speed to 1.5 seconds.

name: Aggressive Recon
description: Getting a Signature Weapon kill gives +15% Signature Weapon Damage for 10s and +25% Reload Speed for the next reload of the weapon (the bonuses do not stack).  Automatically regenerate Signature Weapon Ammo every 60s.

name: Apex Predator
description: Enemies within 15m receive a debuff, amplifying your weapon damage against them by +20%.  Killing a debuffed enemy with your weapon disorients other enemies within 5m, and amplifies weapon damage by 5% for 10s, stacking up to 5 times.

name: Camaraderie
description: Shooting an enemy marks them for 7 seconds.  When a marked enemy dies, receive one stack of 3% Weapon Damage and 2% Critical Hit Damage for each Ally or Skill that has contributed to killing that enemy.  Max stacks is 35. Stacks decay every 10 seconds.  Maximum amount of marks that can be placed is 4.

name: Charging
description: For each second spent out of cover during combat, Agents will get 5% reduced incoming skill damage. Max 50%.  Charged: While fully charged, gain immunity to any movement speed debuff and share this with all of the agents hazard protection and the incoming skill damage with all allies for 10 seconds.  After Charged is consumed, Charging buff will resume if still in combat and out of cover.

name: Core Exercise
description: For each Core attribute, receive 40% of the other two Core Attributes' bonuses.  Skill Tiers count as 1% Skill Efficiency when these attributes are applied.  All pieces from this Gear Set, apart from the Backpack, will feature random Core Attributes.

name: Crowd Control
description: Critical hits mark enemies for 20s, up to 3 marks total.  When you critically hit a marked enemy, all other marked enemies take 60% of the damage dealt.  Whenever a marked enemy dies, gain +2% critical hit damage, stacking up to 20 times, or until combat ends.

name: Dead Man's Hand
description: Flip a card when landing shots with a Rifle or Marksman rifle.  After 5 cards are flipped, the damage of your next shot is amplified by 30%.  More shots are enhanced the better the hand revealed.  Four of a Kind: 4 shots. Full House: 3 shots. Aces and Eights: 2 shots.  Flip an additional card on headshots.

name: Feedback Loop
description: Whenever you use or cancel a skill, your other skill's cooldown is reduced by 30s, total skill repair is increased by 10% for 20s, and total skill damage is increased by 10% for 20s.  Cooldown: 10s.

name: From the Shadows Into the Light
description: From the Shadows: While out of cover and in combat, gain 10 Stacks per second up to 50. Each stack will give 0.8% Armor regen when it is consumed. Stacks consume, 10 stacks per second, only in cover.  Into the Light: While in cover, gain 10 Stacks per second up to 50. Each stack will give 1.2% Critical damage increase and 0.4% RPM. Buff does not apply while shooting from cover. While out of cover Agents lose 2 stacks per second at normal speed and 1 stack per second if sprinting.

name: Ground Control
description: Increases you and your allies' total weapon and skill damage by 15% when at full armor.  When you repair an ally, you and all allies within 5m of you are also repaired for 60% of that amount.

name: Hackstep Protocol
description: Replaces armor kits with an instant, infinite-use ability.  Grants 50% bonus armor for 5s. Hides your nameplate for 5s. Repairs 20% of your armor. Increases total weapon damage by 2% per 5% bonus armor gained, up to 20%.  Ability cooldown: 20s.

name: Headache
description: First Headshot with a Marksman Rifle will increase next headshot by 20%, second consecutive headshot with a Marksman Rifle will give +10% armor (if at full armor it will give bonus armor max +50% of current armor value), third consecutive headshot will refill magazine.  From the fourth headshot forward agents will get all 3 bonuses for each consecutive headshot kill. Missing a headshot will reset the cycle.

name: Heartstopper
description: Headshots apply pulse for 5s.  Weapon hits on pulsed enemies add and refresh a stack of +1% bonus armor and +1.1% weapon damage to pulsed enemies for 5s. Max stack is 50.  Two stacks are lost per second.

name: Huddle
description: Receive +1 Skill Tier for each ally Agent that is within the range of the hive or Smart Cover. While at Skill Tier 6, having at least one ally Agent in the range of your Hive or Smart Cover for 4s will grant Overcharge for 15s. Cooldown: 40s.  Mortars and enemy Skills that enter the range of your Hive or Smart Cover will be destroyed. Cooldown: 10s. The cooldown is 20% faster for each ally agent within the range of your hive or smart cover.

name: Indirect Transmission
description: On kill: Spread status effects of that enemy to all enemies within 10m. Refresh 50% of status effect durations.

name: Makeshift Repairs
description: Whenever you or your shield take damage, 25% of that amount is repaired to both over 10s.

name: On Point
description: Hitting a shot with a rifle or MMR grants 1 stack, max stack equal to magazine size.  Reloading grants 2% handling and 4% WD per stack for 10s. No stacks gained while bonuses are active.  Once timer runs out magazine is refilled. Reloading will stop effect.  Reloading with stacks while inactive will remove all stacks and refill magazine.

name: One in the Hand... ...Two in the bag
Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype
description: The Incinerator Turret spins 360 degrees. You are immune to your own Incinerator Turret's fire. The Incinerator Turret explodes when disabled.

name: Perfect Adrenaline Rush
description: When you are within 10m of an enemy, gain 20% (23%) bonus armor for 5s. Stacks up to 3 times.  Cooldown: 5s

name: Perfect Bloodsucker
description: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +10% (12%) bonus armor for 10s. Max stack is 10.

name: Perfect Braced
description: While in cover weapon handling is increased by 45% (50%).

name: Perfect Calculated
description: Kills from cover reduce skill cooldowns by 10% (15%).

At most once per 5s per weapon type.

name: Perfect Vigilance
description: Increases total weapon damage by 25%. Taking damage disables this buff for 4s (3s).

name: Perfect Wicked
description: Applying a status effect increases total weapon damage by 18% for 20s (27s).

name: Red, White and Blue
description: Enemies you shoot receive stacking debuffs of Red/White/Blue. Changes every 2 seconds.  Red: Amplifies the enemy's damage taken by 8%. White: Hitting the enemy restores you and your allies' armor by 2% once every second. Blue: Decreases enemy damage dealt by 8%.  Full Flag: Enemies that die while under the effect of all three debuffs create a 5m explosion, dealing damage equal to their total health and armor. Explosion strength is reduced on Named enemy deaths.

name: Return to Sender
description: For PvE: Receive repairs of 10% of the damage dealt by your Skills. Your allies will receive repairs of 20% of the damage dealt by your Skills.  For PvP: Receive repairs of 5% of the damage dealt by your Skills. Your allies will receive repairs of 10% of the damage dealt by your Skills.

name: Rules of Engagement
description: Shooting a status affected enemy will apply a mark.  Killing a marked enemy grants a full clip of Hollow-Point Ammo for your active weapon, and half a clip of the agent's active weapon to the rest of the party.  Mark lasts for 10 seconds.  Hollow-Point Ammo amplifies weapon damage by 20% and applies bleed on hit.

name: Stoic
description: Get +4% Damage Resistance for every enemy that is targeting you.  The bonus is multiplied by 1.X, where X is the number of agents in your group.

name: Striker's Gamble
description: Weapon hits increase total weapon damage by 0.65%, stacking up to 100 times. 1 stack lost per second between 0 to 50 stacks; 2 stacks lost per second between 51 and 100 stacks.

name: Symphony
description: Kills Beyond 25 Meters: +40% Weapon Damage to Shotguns, SMGs, and Pistols; +20% Weapon Damage to Assault Rifles and LMGs; and +25% Bonus Armor for 15s.  Kills Within 25 Meters: +40% Weapon Damage to Marksman Rifles and Rifles; +20% Weapon Damage to Assault Rifles and LMGs; and +30% Headshot Damage for 15s.  Intermittently killing enemies from both ranges builds up stacks. At 4 stacks, all bonuses are multiplied by 1.5 and triggered simultaneously for 15s. No stacks gained while talent is active.

name: Tend and Befriend
description: Interacting with your deployed skills grants the skill 25% skill damage for 10s. This buff cannot be refreshed.  Interactions include: Using / Deploying the Skill, Changing the skills target, Healing the skill.

name: Throttle Control
description: Shooting builds stacks to a max of 50. Each stack provides +0.5% Weapon Handling and +4% Critical Hit Damage.  Lose 6 stacks per second while not shooting. No stacks are lost if an enemy is Suppressed.
